memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u32 Start, u32 End)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_RestartIPSM

briefdescription.para: Restarts a requested the tile and ensures that starts from a defined start state and reaches the requested or defined end state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.
is start state of State Machine
is end state of State Machine.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *CallBackRefPtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 StatusEvent)
memberdef.name: StubHandler

briefdescription.para: This is a stub for the status callback.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layers forget to set the handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the upper layer callback reference.
indicates ADC/DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
indicates Block number (0-3).
indicates one or more interrupt occurred.

briefdescription.para: Initialize ADC Tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.

simplesect.para: Static API used to initialize ADC Tiles

briefdescription.para: Initialize DAC Tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.

simplesect.para: Static API used to initialize DAC Tiles

briefdescription.para: Initialize Multiband Configuration for DAC Tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.
is DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

simplesect.para: Static API used to initialize DAC MB Config

briefdescription.para: Initialize Multiband Configuration for ADC Tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.
is ADC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

simplesect.para: Static API used to initialize ADC MB Config

briefdescription.para: This API updates PLL Structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

simplesect.para: Static API used to initialize PLL Settings for ADC and DAC

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_BlockStatus *BlockStatusPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetADCBlockStatus

briefdescription.para: The API returns the requested block status for ADC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3. XRFdc_BlockStatus.
is Pointer to the XRFdc_BlockStatus structure through which the ADC/DAC block status is returned.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_BlockStatus *BlockStatusPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDACBlockStatus

briefdescription.para: The API returns the requested block status for DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3. XRFdc_BlockStatus.
is Pointer to the XRFdc_BlockStatus structure through which the DAC block status is returned.

briefdescription.para: Static API to dump HSCOM registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

briefdescription.para: Static API to dump DAC registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

briefdescription.para: Static API to dump ADC registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 BaseAddr, u32 End)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_WaitForRestartClr

briefdescription.para: This Static API will be used to wait for restart bit clears and also check for PLL Lock if clock source is internal PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is end state of State Machine.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XRFdc instance such that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about xrfdc. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Config.

simplesect.para: The user needs to first call the XRFdc_LookupConfig() API which returns the Configuration structure pointer which is passed as a parameter to the XRFdc_CfgInitialize() API.

briefdescription.para: The API Restarts the requested tile.

detaileddescription.para: It can restart a single tile and alternatively can restart all the tiles. Existing register settings are not lost or altered in the process. It just starts the requested tile(s).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

briefdescription.para: The API stops the tile as requested.

detaileddescription.para: It can also stop all the tiles if asked for. It does not clear any of the existing register settings. It just stops the requested tile(s).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

briefdescription.para: The API resets the requested tile.

detaileddescription.para: It can reset all the tiles as well. In the process, all existing register settings are cleared and are replaced with the settings initially configured (through the GUI).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u32 StartState, u32 EndState)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_CustomStartUp

briefdescription.para: The API starts the requested tile from a provided state and runs to the given end state.

detaileddescription.para: It can restart a single tile and alternatively can restart all the tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.
Valid values are XRFDC_START_STATE_*.
Valid values are XRFDC_END_STATE_*.

simplesect.para: If starting from/ending at XRFDC_START_STATE_OFF/XRFDC_END_STATE_OFF, register settings will be wiped.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 State)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_WaitForState

briefdescription.para: This function is used to wait for a tile to reach a given state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
represents ADC or DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
represents the state which the tile must reach.

briefdescription.para: The API returns the IP status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Pointer to the XRFdc_IPStatus structure through which the status is returned.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_BlockStatus *BlockStatusPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetBlockStatus

briefdescription.para: The API returns the requested block status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3. XRFdc_BlockStatus.
is Pointer to the XRFdc_BlockStatus structure through which the ADC/DAC block status is returned.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Mode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDataPathMode

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the DAC Datapath mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if tile not enabled / out of range.

briefdescription.para: This API is to get the DAC Datapath mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
pointer used to return value.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Mode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetIMRPassMode

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the DAC Image Reject Filter Pass mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 0 (for low pass) 1 (for high pass).

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if tile not enabled / bad parameter passed

briefdescription.para: This API is to get the DAC Image Reject Filter Pass mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
pointer used to return value.

briefdescription.para: This Prints the offset of the register along with the content.

detaileddescription.para: This API is meant to be used for debug purposes. It prints to the console the contents of registers for the passed Tile_Id. If -1 is passed, it prints the contents of the registers for all the tiles for the respective ADC or DAC

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3, and -1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Pwr_Mode_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetPwrMode

briefdescription.para: Set The Power up/down mode of a given converter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0-3.
is a pointer with the power mode settings.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, XRFdc_Pwr_Mode_Settings *SettingsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetPwrMode

briefdescription.para: Get The Power up/down mode of a given converter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0-3.
is a pointer to be filled with the power mode settings.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegAddr, u16 Mask, u16 Data)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_ClrSetReg

briefdescription.para: Execute Read modify Write.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is address of a block.
is register offset value.
contains bit mask value.
contains value to be written to register.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegAddr, u16 Mask)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_ClrReg

briefdescription.para: Execute Read and clear.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is address of a block.
is register offset value.
contains bit mask value.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegAddr, u16 Mask)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_RDReg

briefdescription.para: Execute Read and mask with the value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is address of a block.
is register offset value.
contains bit mask value.

briefdescription.para: Get ADC type is High Speed or Medium Speed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.

listitem.para: Return 1 if ADC type is a dual type
Return 0 if quad or invalid tile.

briefdescription.para: Get IP BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.

briefdescription.para: Get Tile BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return Tile BaseAddress if valid tile.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_Get_BlockBaseAddr

briefdescription.para: Get Block BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3 in DAC/ADC-2GSPS and 0-1 in ADC-4GSPS.

briefdescription.para: Get Number of DAC Blocks enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return number of DAC blocks enabled.

briefdescription.para: Get Number of ADC Blocks enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return number of ADC blocks enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDataWidth

briefdescription.para: Get Data Width for ADC/DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether ADC/DAC tile is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.

briefdescription.para: Gets ADC/DAC tile maximum sampling rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
pointer for maximum sample rate.

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if could not find sampling rate.

briefdescription.para: Gets ADC/DAC tile minimum sampling rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
pointer for minimum sample rate.

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if could not find sampling rate.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the device is a DFE variant or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to get the driver version.
